allow: Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\);console.log\('TOP KEYS:',Object.keys\(j\)\);for\(const k of Object.keys\(j\)\){const v=j[k];if\(Array.isArray\(v\)\){console.log\(k,'= array len',v.length,'| sample:',JSON.stringify\(v.slice\(0,2\)\)\);}else if\(typeof v==='object'\){console.log\(k,'= object keys',Object.keys\(v\).slice\(0,10\)\);}else{console.log\(k,'=',v\);}}}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\);const p=j.pokemon;console.log\('pokemon type:',Array.isArray\(p\)?'array len '+p.length:typeof p\);if\(Array.isArray\(p\)\){console.log\(JSON.stringify\(p.slice\(0,3\),null,2\)\);}else{const ks=Object.keys\(p\);console.log\('keys sample:',ks.slice\(0,5\)\);console.log\(JSON.stringify\(p[ks[0]],null,2\)\);}}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\);const cats={};for\(const r of j.rows\){\(cats[r.category]=cats[r.category]||[]\).push\(r\);}console.log\('categories:',Object.keys\(cats\)\);for\(const c of Object.keys\(cats\)\){console.log\('--- '+c+' \(top2\) ---'\);console.log\(JSON.stringify\(cats[c].slice\(0,2\)\)\);}}\)")

Bash(node --experimental-sqlite -e "const {DatabaseSync}=require\('node:sqlite'\);const db=new DatabaseSync\(':memory:'\);db.exec\('CREATE TABLE t\(a\)'\);db.prepare\('INSERT INTO t VALUES\(?\)'\).run\(5\);console.log\('node:sqlite OK', db.prepare\('SELECT a FROM t'\).get\(\)\);")
